page_metadata.biotools__summary: An analysis pipeline for mapping mutations using RNA-seq. It works without parental strain information, without the requirement of a pre-existing snp map of the organism, and without erroneous assumptions that recombination occurs at the same frequency across the genome.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: An analysis pipeline for mapping mutations using RNA-seq. It works without parental strain information, without the requirement of a pre-existing snp map of the organism, and without erroneous assumptions that recombination occurs at the same frequency across the genome.
